data.body: Modify src/installed_workflows/compatibility.rs build_compatibility_prompts() to accept the loaded profiles map and produce per-profile rendered prompt bodies. For each profile, render skills prompt text with the profile's output mode (from profile.outputs) substituted into {{ output }} and output-mode-specific instructions resolved. Populate each profile's action_prompts BTreeMap so prompt_body_for_state() in poll_claim.rs picks up the rendered variant instead of falling through to the raw skills fallback. Move or duplicate the render_prompt_template logic from tests_helpers.rs into production code.
data.title: Wire compatibility workflow to render per-profile prompt variants
